proposedPhaseName: Phase 3B-M Cash Flow Controlled Loader Swap
preconditions: Rollback SQL templates prepared per company
Flag resolver + keys implemented and tested

flagDesign.unifiedWhen: loader AND engine AND screen AND NOT kill_switch

smokeTestSteps: Login DIN CHINA / DIN BRIDAL / DIN COUTURE
Cash Flow page loads without console errors
Main table shows unified-aligned totals (not legacy) when flag ON
Preview toggle still available for compare if retained
Row-keyed JSON export if compare panel retained
rollbackSteps: Redeploy prior frontend if code defect
postSwapEvidenceRequired: screenshots of main Cash Flow totals
commitDeploySequence: 1. Implement resolver + main loader branch in code
4. Frontend deploy (vps-build-erp-only.sh) — only after operator approval
5. Enable screen flag if needed (may already be ON from engine rollout)
6. Enable loader flag per company ONE AT A TIME or all three per operator plan
requiredOperatorApprovalText: I approve Phase 3B-M Cash Flow controlled loader swap planning/execution for DIN CHINA, DIN BRIDAL, and DIN COUTURE. I understand that aligned preview finance basis differs from legacy Cash Flow for DIN CHINA and DIN BRIDAL. I approve proceeding to a controlled loader-swap phase only; no GL/data mutations are approved.
